sectionProjectsSubtitle: Products where architecture, delivery and real-world constraints had to work together.
sectionExperienceSubtitle: My professional journey from embedded development through robotics and cross-platform applications to complete system design.
sectionArchitectureTitle: From idea to a working system.
sectionArchitectureSubtitle: A transparent, iterative development process with short feedback cycles, measurable milestones, and continuous client collaboration.
sectionContactSubtitle: If you are building something ambitious, I am happy to talk.
contactFormFeedback: Frontend-only form for now. Connect EmailJS, Formspree or a backend endpoint later.
projectPageIntro: A curated selection of work across software, systems and product delivery.
processNarrative: I work with an agile mindset, short feedback cycles, and incrementally deliverable results. The exact process is adapted to the project size, risks, and the way the client operates.
processSectionSubtitle: Transparent steps and real value in every stage.
processStepDiscoverDescription: We map business goals, user problems, technical constraints, and priorities together.
processStepPlanDescription: We define the scope, milestones, acceptance criteria, and implementation order.
processStepDesignDescription: We design the system components, data flow, integrations, and technical foundations.
processStepBuildDescription: Working, demonstrable features are delivered in short, priority-driven iterations.
processStepValidateDescription: Developer testing, integration checks, smoke tests, and client feedback guide refinement.
processStepDeliverDescription: Release, documentation, stabilization, and the support needed for a successful handover.
processStepImproveDescription: We define the next iterations, new features, and long-term development direction together.
processValueOneDescription: Development stays centered on business outcomes and user problems.
processValueTwoDescription: Regular working versions and transparent progress in every iteration.
processValueThreeDescription: Continuous alignment, feedback points, and straightforward reporting.
processValueFourDescription: Risks are identified early and handled actively during the project.
processValueFiveDescription: I deliver tested, documented, and maintainable solutions.
processValueSixDescription: You can rely on me after delivery for support and future development.
processTechnicalSubtitle: I design systems with modular, extensible, and testable architecture. The technology is always aligned with the project needs.
processTechnicalWorkPointOne: Agile mindset with short feedback cycles
processTechnicalWorkPointThree: A working, deliverable result at the end of each iteration
processTechnicalWorkPointFour: Code review, static analysis, and automated tests
processTechnicalWorkPointFive: CI/CD and version control with a Git-based workflow
processBottomCtaTitle: Let’s work together on your next project.
processBottomCtaSubtitle: Get in touch and let’s turn the idea into a working product together.
architectureFlowValue: UI -> Cubit -> UseCase -> Repository -> Engine -> DataSource
